name: @sidecodeapp/desktop
description: Sidecode desktop GUI — Electrobun (bun + WKWebView) + Vite + React 19 + Astryx
author: sidecode

scripts.package: bun run --cwd ../protocol build && bun run --cwd ../daemon build && vite build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:notarize: set -a; . ./.env.local 2>/dev/null || true; set +a; bun run --cwd ../protocol build && bun run --cwd ../daemon build && vite build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:publish: set -a; . ./.env.local 2>/dev/null || true; set +a; bun run --cwd ../protocol build && bun run --cwd ../daemon build && vite build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish always
